text: Blockchain is a distributed, immutable ledger where transactions are grouped into blocks, cryptographically linked in a chain. Satoshi Nakamoto's Bitcoin (2009) was the first. Consensus mechanisms: Proof-of-Work (Bitcoin, mining), Proof-of-Stake (Ethereum since 2022, validators stake). Blockchain = decentralized trust without intermediaries.
51% attack: controlling majority of hash power/stake enables double-spending.
